creator: ali.abdallah@suse.com
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #15)

That is what I have (minimal configuration):

# cat /boot/loader.conf

aesni_load="YES"
geom_eli_load="YES"
geom_part_gpt_load="YES"
geom_label_load="YES"
geom_eli_passphrase_prompt="YES"

efi_max_resolution="1280x720"

vfs.root.mountfrom="ufs:nvd0p3.eli"
...

It is still giving me 'Crypto: accelerated software'
